failure_reason: Removed bmf_apply_rule_native and the Go/Rust/TypeScript host-kernel BMF rule matcher implementations. The native audit now reports no BML/BMF semantic natives and forbids both bml_scan_file and bmf_apply_rule_native registrations while requiring generic source_scan_file. The new Form object-rule proof returns 2047 across sibling kernels, covering object, sequence, capture, choice, star, opt, cut, stop, source spans, and reverse emission through engine.fk. BMF component/source proofs remain 1023, BML file forward/backward remains 131071, and the generic scanner proof remains 511.
